# Materials Screening

Materials screening sub-package manages the LCA screening of early stage material production concepts. A materials screening project ([`Project`](project.md#pod_lca.materials_screening.Project)) can maintain multiple models ([`Model`](model.md#pod_lca.materials_screening.Model)) reflecting alternative concept choices. Each model will made up of it consituent list of [`Product`](products-and-processes.md#pod_lca.materials_screening.Product) and [`Process`](products-and-processes.md#pod_lca.materials_screening.Process) objects.
